learning-agent v0.11.0 cloned to ~/.learning-rt/learning-agent, uv venv with Python 3.11.15, core deps installed, learning-rt CLI verified
profile 'specify' created at ~/.learning-rt/profiles/specify with 81 bundled skills synced; sticky default set
skill pack scaffolded at templates/learning-rt-skills/spec-driven/ (SKILL.md + references + report template); symlinked into profile and visible via learning-rt skills list as source=local

Superseded: pivoting to in-house implementation on top of existing Claude Agent SDK runtime. External wrapper-runtime path blocked by Anthropic third-party-OAuth ban (effective 2026-01-09), so subscription billing flows only through user-invoked claude CLI. New plan re-implements memory + skill-creation mechanisms directly in specify's TS code.

Added MemoryProvider interface in src/agent/memory-provider.ts with FileBackedMemoryProvider default impl. Refactored memory-mcp.ts and sdk-runner.ts to consume the provider abstraction. 4 new tests pass; full suite green (46/46).

Added SQLite+FTS5 session transcript indexer in src/agent/session-store.ts. Schema: sessions + events + events_fts virtual table, automatic insert/update/delete triggers keep FTS in sync. SessionStore.attachToEventBus subscribes to the event bus and lazily ensures session rows. sdk-runner now opens the store at run start, attaches it for the lifetime of runSpecifyAgent, detaches+closes in finally. 5 new tests pass; full suite 51/51 green.

Three-layer prompt context shipped in src/agent/memory-layers.ts. User layer (~/.specify/memory.md), project layer (SPECIFY.md or CLAUDE.md), per-spec observations (specify.observations.yaml v1 schema with id/description/area_id/behavior_id/source/session_id/created_at/confidence). Loader merges all three into prompt preamble with confidence floor + budget-bounded trimming. sdk-runner applies layered context to all tasks. 9 new tests; full suite 60/60.

Cooperative-QA feedback channel shipped end-to-end. src/agent/feedback.ts: ingestFeedback() routes by kind (note / important_pattern / missed_check / false_positive / ignore_pattern / file_bug), writes to specify.observations.yaml with provenance, spawns bd CLI for file_bug, emits feedback:ingested + feedback:propagate_pattern events. POST /api/feedback in src/review/server.ts. webapp/src/api.ts: postFeedback(). webapp/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx + ActivityStream inline flag affordance + session-level feedback. CSS in globals.css. 5 new tests; full suite 65/65; webapp bundles cleanly.

Cooperative-QA feedback channel shipped end-to-end. src/agent/feedback.ts: ingestFeedback() routes by kind (note / important_pattern / missed_check / false_positive / ignore_pattern / file_bug), writes to specify.observations.yaml with provenance, spawns bd CLI for file_bug, emits feedback:ingested + feedback:propagate_pattern events. POST /api/feedback in src/review/server.ts. webapp/src/api.ts: postFeedback(). webapp/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx + ActivityStream inline flag affordance + session-level feedback. CSS in globals.css. 5 new tests; full suite 65/65; webapp bundles cleanly.

Pattern propagator (SP-9ei) listens for feedback:propagate_pattern events and injects a sibling-check directive into the active MessageInjector during a verify run, so user-flagged important patterns get applied across siblings without leaving the session. Wired in sdk-runner alongside other learning components. Confidence store (SP-3yl) tallies accept/override per behavior from feedback:ingested events; autonomyDecision combines the rate with a preset (ask_everything / ask_uncertain / autonomous) to choose between asking and silent. 11 new tests; full suite 76/76.

Pattern propagator (SP-9ei) listens for feedback:propagate_pattern events and injects a sibling-check directive into the active MessageInjector during a verify run, so user-flagged important patterns get applied across siblings without leaving the session. Wired in sdk-runner alongside other learning components. Confidence store (SP-3yl) tallies accept/override per behavior from feedback:ingested events; autonomyDecision combines the rate with a preset (ask_everything / ask_uncertain / autonomous) to choose between asking and silent. 11 new tests; full suite 76/76.

Playwright CDP-attach shipped in src/agent/cdp-attach.ts. attachToUserChrome connects via chromium.connectOverCDP to a user-driven Chrome on  or 9222, returns first context+page, instruments page-level events (browser:navigation, browser:click, browser:input, browser:console) onto the event bus tagged with sessionId. Page observer auto-reinstalls on framenavigated. Detach helper removes instrumentation without closing the user's browser; disconnect closes the Playwright connection only. 4 new tests; full suite 80/80.

Session replay store (SP-390): SessionStore.replay() returns chronological event timeline; recentEvents() tails last N for context lookups. New /api/sessions/:id/replay endpoint in review server. Context-rich feedback (SP-d9c): ingestFeedback now optionally fetches recentEvents (configurable count) when sessionId is set and prepends a 'Context (last events leading up to feedback)' block to the observation description so future runs see what the user was looking at. Tests stub the fetcher; default impl opens session-store on the fly. 4 new tests; full suite 84/84.

Session replay store (SP-390): SessionStore.replay() returns chronological event timeline; recentEvents() tails last N for context lookups. New /api/sessions/:id/replay endpoint in review server. Context-rich feedback (SP-d9c): ingestFeedback now optionally fetches recentEvents (configurable count) when sessionId is set and prepends a 'Context (last events leading up to feedback)' block to the observation description so future runs see what the user was looking at. Tests stub the fetcher; default impl opens session-store on the fly. 4 new tests; full suite 84/84.

Pattern miner shipped in src/agent/pattern-miner.ts. Heuristic n-gram (length 2-4) extractor over the session-store corpus; tracks per-pattern occurrences, distinct sessionCount, capped illustrative examples. Filterable by role / kind-prefix / kind-exclusion. Scoring weights sessionCount over raw count so single-session loops don't dominate. No LLM dependency — synthesizer (SP-a71) decides which candidates earn natural-language descriptions. 5 new tests; full suite 89/89.

Skill draft synthesizer in src/agent/skill-synthesizer.ts. synthesizeDraft writes pattern-derived SKILL.md drafts to .specify/skill-drafts/<id>.md with frontmatter (name, description, version, status:pending, metadata.specify with pattern_id/signature/sessionCount/occurrences). Pluggable describer: heuristic default produces a usable starter; callers can pass an LLM-backed describer for polished output. listDrafts + setDraftStatus power the review UI (SP-bgd). Embedded minimal yaml encoder/decoder avoids a runtime dep just for a small frontmatter shape. 5 new tests; full suite 94/94.

Drafts review pane (SP-bgd) shipped: GET /api/skill-drafts, POST approve/reject, GET /api/skills/active. webapp/src/components/SkillDraftsPanel.tsx with expand/approve/reject + body preview, polled every 15s. Approved skill replay (SP-5i3) shipped: promoteDraft moves the draft to .specify/skills/<name>/SKILL.md (status flipped to approved), refuses overwrite collisions; listActiveSkills + renderActiveSkillsPrompt produce a prompt preamble injected into every spec-aware run by sdk-runner so approved skills replay autonomously next session. 4 new tests; full suite 98/98; webapp bundles cleanly.

Drafts review pane (SP-bgd) shipped: GET /api/skill-drafts, POST approve/reject, GET /api/skills/active. webapp/src/components/SkillDraftsPanel.tsx with expand/approve/reject + body preview, polled every 15s. Approved skill replay (SP-5i3) shipped: promoteDraft moves the draft to .specify/skills/<name>/SKILL.md (status flipped to approved), refuses overwrite collisions; listActiveSkills + renderActiveSkillsPrompt produce a prompt preamble injected into every spec-aware run by sdk-runner so approved skills replay autonomously next session. 4 new tests; full suite 98/98; webapp bundles cleanly.

Prompt evolution shipped in src/agent/prompt-evolution.ts. heuristicEvolve folds high-confidence observations + overridden-behavior hints into the system prompt; pure-text, no API dep. externalEvolve shells to optional scripts/evolve-prompt.py with JSON corpus on stdin (DSPy/GEPA integration point). evolvePrompt writes versioned prompts to .specify/prompts/<timestamp>_<id>.md so reverts are git-trivial. buildCorpus aggregates observations + confidence + recent sessions. 5 new tests; full suite 103/103. Note: external Python optimiser is opt-in; specify install never depends on Python.

Honcho dialectic provider shipped in src/agent/honcho-provider.ts. HonchoMemoryProvider implements MemoryProvider; reads delegate to FileBackedMemoryProvider for structured rows; prefetch additionally calls /v1/apps/<app>/users/<user>/dialectic for the dialectic representation and prepends it to the local prompt; writes still hit the file backend AND best-effort POST observations as events. Configured via HONCHO_URL / HONCHO_APP / HONCHO_USER / HONCHO_TOKEN env vars; sdk-runner picks Honcho automatically when HONCHO_URL is set, otherwise default file-backed. Failures are silent and never break the run. 5 new tests; full suite 108/108.

All 16 children shipped. Specify now has: MemoryProvider abstraction (SP-y0y), SQLite+FTS5 session indexer (SP-j1d), three-layer prompt context (SP-k9w), optional Honcho dialectic provider (SP-0l2), prompt evolution loop (SP-0xk), cooperative-QA Tier 1 - webapp feedback panel + ingest endpoint (SP-2d5/SP-a7a), in-session sibling propagation (SP-9ei), confidence model (SP-3yl), Playwright CDP-attach for shared browser context (SP-olt), session replay store (SP-390), context-rich feedback (SP-d9c), pattern miner (SP-l22), skill draft synthesizer (SP-a71), drafts review pane + approve/reject (SP-bgd), approved-skill replay (SP-5i3). 108 tests green; webapp bundles cleanly.
